title: 'Nippon Sangoku' Unveils Additional Cast, Ending Theme, Third Promo
content: The official website for the television anime adaptation of Ikka Matsuki's Nippon Sangoku manga unveiled additional cast, a special visual (pictured), the ending theme, and third promotional video on Monday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere on April 7 at 12:00 a.m. on To...

content: The 13th and final episode of Golden Kamuy: Saishuushou (Golden Kamuy Final Season) announced an anime sequel adapting the Bousou Ressha-hen (Runaway Train arc) on Monday. The official website also revealed a teaser visual (pictured). The sequel is scheduled to be released next W...

title: 'Gintama' Creator Hideaki Sorachi Begins New Manga in April 2026
content: The 18th issue of Weekly Shounen Jump magazine announced that a new manga by Hideaki Sorachi, 2-nen B-gumi Yuusha Destroyers (Hero Destroyers of Class 2B), will begin in the 21st issue on April 20. This marks Sorachi's first serialization in seven years after the end of Gintama i...
